nasb.text: Then He cried out to me and spoke to me saying, “See, those who are going to the land of the north have appeased My wrath in the land of the north.”

esv.text: Then he cried to me, “Behold, those who go toward the north country have set my Spirit at rest in the north country.”

cnv.text: 他又呼喚我，對我說：“你看，那些出來往北方之地去的，已經在北方之地使我心靈的忿怒平息下來。”

ccb.text: 他又高声对我说：“看啊，那些到北方去的已在那里使我的心得到安慰。”
